rule: Sitemap may include only published, indexable routes that pass Quality Gate.

policy.lastmod_policy: Set to the date of last verified content review, not the build date. Build date must not be used as lastmod.
policy.hreflang_sitemap_note: Hreflang alternates are included in the sitemap only for published, active language routes with verified hreflang groups. Unpublished language routes must not appear in sitemap hreflang entries.
exclusion_rules: Routes with status 'planned' are excluded from sitemap.
Routes with status 'draft' are excluded from sitemap.
Routes with status 'inactive' are excluded from sitemap.
Routes with in_sitemap: false are excluded from sitemap.
Routes with indexable: false are excluded from sitemap.
Routes that have not passed the Quality Gate are excluded from sitemap.
Unpublished language alternate routes are excluded from hreflang sitemap entries.
